# Super-fast characterization cryostat for sub-kelvin and kelvin temperatures
[![](https://kiutra.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/Arrow-White.png)](https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat#intro)
SOLUTIONS / L-TYPE RAPID CRYOSTAT
## Super-fast characterization cryostat for sub-kelvin and kelvin temperatures
[![](https://kiutra.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/Arrow-White.png)](https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat#intro)
## Overcoming the cryogenic characterization bottleneck
### Why we have built the L-Type Rapid
We designed the L-Type Rapid to tackle a key challenge in low-temperature research – slow and complex characterization. Rapid by name, rapid in performance, it removes bottlenecks that delay insights and slow progress.
Why should millikelvin cooling be limited to experienced researchers? And why should these experts spend their time managing cryostats instead of focusing on their work? Characterization should be fast.
If a measurement only takes 30 minutes, why wait days for results? And why wait for hours of cooling time only to discover that a device or contact failed?
The L-Type Rapid changes the equation. Whether you’re testing new materials or developing quantum devices, it delivers fast, cost-effective, and user-friendly cryogenic characterization. Because getting results quickly should be the standard, not the exception.
## **Unmatched usability and efficiency**
### Key benefits
#### Fastest feedback, shortest cycles
Dramatically shorten your innovation cycles, cut costs and advance your research with the fastest cryostat on the market. The L-Type Rapid enables characterization down to 50 mK and delivers a seamless workflow. While another measurement runs, prepare samples outside the cryostat using our ESD-safe room temperature breakout box. The system loads samples automatically. You will know within minutes if your sample is alive and fit for the upcoming measurements. Sample cooldown to millikelvin temperatures takes only a few hours and can be used to record valuable cooling curves. Sample extraction and warmup, again, are automatic and swift, freeing the system for the next run. This way, **the L-Type Rapid achieves exceptional turnaround times of just 2–5 hours** – unmatched in speed and efficiency.
#### Simplified operations, designed with the highest attention to detail
The L-Type Rapid is designed with a deep understanding of the challenges in cryogenic applications, making it a versatile choice for everyone from early-day students to seasoned cryogenic experts. Automatic sample loading and unloading, combined with intuitive temperature control, ensures a superior user experience. New users quickly become familiar with its operation, even without prior knowledge of cryogenics. All operation routines are fully automated and can easily be integrated with characterization tasks. Additionally, our well-documented API enables the system to connect with existing infrastructure and measurement equipment, facilitating the implementation of complex characterization routines.
#### Flexible and future-proof
With a wide range of add-ons and extensions, the platform can be easily configured and upgraded to meet today’s and future requirements of many applications. The modular design lets you configure the system for your specific use case. Options include the integration of high-quality RF wiring, cryo-electronics components in various configurations, magnetic shielding, a sample magnet, and Quantum Machines’ cryogenic chip carriers.
**50 mK to 300 K temperature range**
Outstanding temperature stability over the whole range from very low millikelvin to room temperature.
****Superior turnaround times****
Record-fast warmup, sample exchange and cooldown procedures allow multiple runs per day and eliminate costly downtimes.
******Safe and automatic operation******
Smart engineering and cryogen-free cooling simplify everyday use, empower inexperienced users and enable instrument sharing in educational institutions and large-scale facilities.
## Simple sample preparation and automatic transfer
### Core components and workflow overview
Puck 55
Puck Station 55
Transfer Cage
Automatic Sample Loader
The L-Type Rapid works with a puck-based system, enabling you to prepare experiments outside the cryostat while measurements are running. Using the Puck Station, you can check both DC and RF connections at room temperature and perform a reference measurement. When ready, the puck is placed in the Automatic Sample Loader using the Puck Transfer Cage. The instrument software fully automates the sample loading and cooling processes, minimizing physical interaction with the cryostat to just a few minutes.
The loading and unloading process, including airlock evacuation and transferring the puck to or from the millikelvin stage, takes less than 10 minutes.
Once loaded, the puck is cooled down automatically. Samples can be unloaded at any time, regardless of the cryostat temperature.
After unloading, the puck can be warmed in an inert gas environment to prevent condensation.
### Watch a video demo of the process
## L-Type Rapid cryostat platform
### Tailor our product system to your specific use case
The L-Type Rapid is highly modular, and can be equipped with none, one, two, or three cooling units, depending on the cooling requirements.   
| Configurations   | 0P55  | 1P55  | 2P55  | 3P55  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| Turnaround time  | < 2 h  | < 3 h  | < 4 h  | < 4.5 h  |  
| Base temperature  | < 3.0 K  | < 150 mK  | < 100 mK   | < 50 mK  |  
| Continuous operation  | < 3.0 K  | < 3.0 K  | < 200 mK  | < 100 mK  |  
| Sample platform  | Puck 55  | Puck 55  | Puck 55  | Puck 55  |  
| DC wiring   | 48   | 48  | 48   | 48   |  
| RF wiring  | up to 12  | 0  | up to 12  | up to 12  |  
**Specifications are guaranteed with wiring, standard options and integrations.**
[Download](https://kiutra.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/L-Type-Platform-November-2025.pdf)
## Adapt the L-Type Rapid to fit your specific needs, making it turn-key
### Options and components
#### Magnetic shielding or sample magnet options
  * Mount superconducting and mu-metal multi-layer magnetic shielding around the sample space to characterize sensitive superconducting devices such as resonators and qubits.
  * Alternatively, you can integrate a sample magnet:  
5 T or 8 T solenoid magnets  
3 – 1 – 1 T vector magnet 


#### RF lines and cryogenic electronic components
  * Extend standard DC lines with semi-rigid RF cables, rated to 18 GHz, and customer-specific attenuation for each line.
  * Integrate a variety of RF electronic components, including low-noise amplifiers, isolators, and filters into the DC and RF wiring trees, ensuring compatibility with state-of-the-art characterization techniques for all kinds of quantum devices.


#### Compatibility and integration
  * Fit the popular cryogenic chip carriers, [**QBoard**](https://www.quantum-machines.co/products/qboard/) and [**QCage**](https://www.quantum-machines.co/products/qcage/) by Quantum Machines, onto your puck to speed up and optimize your measurements of sensitive quantum devices.
  * You can also integrate other Quantum Machines products, such as the [**QFilter**](https://www.quantum-machines.co/products/qfilter/) low-pass filter for DC lines and the [**QBox**](https://www.quantum-machines.co/products/qbox/) DC wiring breakout with your L-Type Rapid cryostat.


## Smart control
### kiutra.io 
kiutra.io is our modern instrument control software designed to streamline your workflows and make accessing and using cryogenic temperatures more intuitive.
### Intuitive graphical user interface
kiutra.io offers pre-configured control functions through a modern, graphical user interface. It ensures intuitive and fast access of all core features of the cryostat, such as temperature control, sample magnet, and the automatic sample loader.
### Browser-based operation
The software runs from your browser on a PC, laptop, tablet, or any other device with a network connection. This ensures maximum flexibility in everyday use, while ruling out compatibility issues with different operating systems in your setup.
### System health monitor and live data
Real-time updates on important parameters minimize errors and downtime. Live plots help you monitor your cryostat and measurements in real time, keeping you in control throughout the experiment at any time.
### Touch optimized
An iPad mounted directly on the cryostat runs a touch-optimized version of the instrument control software. Monitor key parameters and initiate essential processes right at the system, freeing up lab space and eliminating the need for dedicated measurement PCs.
### Guided user interface
Step-by-step instructions help both experienced and inexperienced users navigate the system and perform tasks with ease.
### Seamless integration with Python
An integrated jupyter lab environment lets you automate processes, execute scripts and customize routines – all directly from the user interface.

## Tailored advice, expert setup and ongoing support
### Personalized buying experience
Our team of physicists, with extensive experience in cryogenics, provides expert advice tailored to your specific needs, whether for technical information or a deeper exploration of your system requirements. We approach each project with a problem-solving mindset, enabling you to gain valuable insights and feedback. When helpful, we can connect you with reference customers who have experience with our systems.
### System assembly and on-site setup
Once your order is confirmed, we’ll provide an estimated delivery date and keep you informed throughout the assembly process. We’ll send pre-installation guidance and checklists, and, if needed, we will bring a mobile crane to the installation. When the cryostat is ready, we’ll ship it and coordinate the installation schedule. Our commissioning process includes comprehensive training along with site acceptance testing to ensure everything meets your expectations.
### Comprehensive system support
We offer technical support via phone, email, web, or remote desktop, along with necessary software updates to keep your system fully functional. We speedily respond to service requests. Our team will first attempt to resolve issues through remote support. If the issue cannot be fixed remotely, our qualified cryo-engineers and service technicians will promptly provide on-site maintenance and repair. In addition to our standard warranty, we also offer extended and premium options for enhanced support.

## FAQ
### Will magnetic cooling expose my sample to harmful stray fields?
Our cryostat design mitigates magnetic fields to protect sensitive materials and devices. It uses compensated superconducting magnets and maximizes the distance between the sample stage and cooling units. Stray fields at the sample position remain below 50 µT – about the strength of the Earth’s magnetic field – even when all magnets are fully powered.
### Can I get ESD protection?
Yes, the system can be configured with ESD protection. [Get in touch](https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us) for setup details. 
### Does the L-Type Rapid provide continuous cooling?
Yes, depending on the configuration: continuous cooling is provided above 100 mK with 3-stage ADR, or above 200 mK with 2-stage ADR. [Full spec sheet here](https://kiutra.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/L-Type-Platform-November-2025.pdf). 
### What do you mean by turnaround time?
It’s the time between measurements on separately loaded samples:**  
**Unloading: ~5 min  
Warming up: ~30 min   
Loading: ~5 min   
Cooling down: 2–4.5 hours (depending on configuration)   
**Total: ~40 min handling plus 2–4.5 hours cooldown.**
### Can I get magnetic shielding?
Yes, we can integrate magnetic shielding both on the system level and on the puck itself. This reduces the residual field by two orders of magnitude. [Get in touch](https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us) for integration details.
### Can I customize the system?
Yes, it’s highly customizable. [See options](https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#options) or [contact us](https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us) to configure.
### Can I upgrade to a different configuration after delivery?
Yes. Our cryostats are designed to accommodate future upgrades. [Get in touch](https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us) to discuss options. 
### Can I get a sample magnet?
Yes. We can integrate:   
5 T or 8 T solenoid magnets  
3 – 1 – 1 T vector magnet   
[Get in touch](https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us) to discuss options. 
### How large is the sample space?
Puck 55:   
55 mm in diameter and 117 mm in heigh  
[Download the data sheet](https://kiutra.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/kiutra-L-Type-Rapid-Technical-Data-Sheet-Puck-55-1.pdf)  

### Is there space to integrate RF electronics?
Yes, in addition to the sample space on the puck, there is ample room to integrate cryogenic electronic components at the 4 K stage and on the sample stage. [Get in touch](https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us) to discuss.
### What wiring is included in the system?
The system is equipped with DC lines. It can be configured with RF wiring and RF electronics during the assembly. [See options](https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#options). 
### Is there a full system manual available?
Yes, there is. [Get in touch](https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us) if you are interested in getting a copy.
### Can I measure qubits? 
Yes. See how we measured T1 times in superconducting qubits in [this application note](https://kiutra.com/download-l-type-rapid-for-long-term-t1-benchmarking-of-superconducting-qubits/). 
### Does the cryostat need regular maintenance? 
The cryostat itself does not. The compressor requires maintenance every 30,000 operating hours, and the coldhead after 20,000 hours.
### Do you have a support line?
Yes. You can reach the team here:  
Phone: +49 (0)89 – 356 479 77 – 0   
Email: support@kiutra.com   
Cryostat control software GUI 
### Can I see a demo?
**Yes,**[get in touch](https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us) to book a demo with our team. 
### Can I try the system before I buy?
Yes. You can test the system with our [discovery program](https://kiutra.com/elevate-your-quantum-r-and-d/). 
### Do you offer service contracts?
Yes, we offer service contracts covering wearing parts during the warranty period and beyond.
### Do you offer staff training?
Yes, we offer both remote and in-person training.

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center">Overcoming the cryogenic characterization bottleneck</h2>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center">Why we have built the L-Type Rapid</h3>



<div class="wp-block-group"><div class="wp-block-group__inner-container is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">We designed the L-Type Rapid to tackle a key challenge in low-temperature research – slow and complex characterization. Rapid by name, rapid in performance, it removes bottlenecks that delay insights and slow progress.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Why should millikelvin cooling be limited to experienced researchers? And why should these experts spend their time managing cryostats instead of focusing on their work? Characterization should be fast.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">If a measurement only takes 30 minutes, why wait days for results? And why wait for hours of cooling time only to discover that a device or contact failed?</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">The L-Type Rapid changes the equation. Whether you’re testing new materials or developing quantum devices, it delivers fast, cost-effective, and user-friendly cryogenic characterization. Because getting results quickly should be the standard, not the exception.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-black-color has-text-color"><strong>Unmatched usability and efficiency</strong></h2>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading has-black-color has-text-color" style="font-size:30px">Key benefits</h3>



<div class="wp-block-group has-black-color has-grey-background-color has-text-color has-background"><div class="wp-block-group__inner-container is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow">
<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js is-open" data-initially-open="true" data-click-to-close="false" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h4 id="at-340" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">Fastest feedback, shortest cycles</h4><div id="ac-340" class="c-accordion__content">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Dramatically shorten your innovation cycles, cut costs and advance your research with the fastest cryostat on the market. The L-Type Rapid enables characterization down to 50 mK and delivers a seamless workflow. While another measurement runs, prepare samples outside the cryostat using our ESD-safe room temperature breakout box. The system loads samples automatically. You will know within minutes if your sample is alive and fit for the upcoming measurements. Sample cooldown to millikelvin temperatures takes only a few hours and can be used to record valuable cooling curves. Sample extraction and warmup, again, are automatic and swift, freeing the system for the next run. This way, <strong>the L-Type Rapid achieves exceptional turnaround times of just 2–5 hours</strong> – unmatched in speed and efficiency.</p>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="false" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h4 id="at-341" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">Simplified operations, designed with the highest attention to detail</h4><div id="ac-341" class="c-accordion__content">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">The L-Type Rapid is designed with a deep understanding of the challenges in cryogenic applications, making it a versatile choice for everyone from early-day students to seasoned cryogenic experts. Automatic sample loading and unloading, combined with intuitive temperature control, ensures a superior user experience. New users quickly become familiar with its operation, even without prior knowledge of cryogenics. All operation routines are fully automated and can easily be integrated with characterization tasks. Additionally, our well-documented API enables the system to connect with existing infrastructure and measurement equipment, facilitating the implementation of complex characterization routines.</p>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="false" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h4 id="at-342" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">Flexible and future-proof</h4><div id="ac-342" class="c-accordion__content">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">With a wide range of add-ons and extensions, the platform can be easily configured and upgraded to meet today’s and future requirements of many applications. The modular design lets you configure the system for your specific use case. Options include the integration of high-quality RF wiring, cryo-electronics components in various configurations, magnetic shielding, a sample magnet, and Quantum Machines’ cryogenic chip carriers.</p>
</div></div>
</div></div>
</div>
</div>
</div></article>

<p class="wp-block-paragraph">The L-Type Rapid works with a puck-based system, enabling you to prepare experiments outside the cryostat while measurements are running. Using the Puck Station, you can check both DC and RF connections at room temperature and perform a reference measurement. When ready, the puck is placed in the Automatic Sample Loader using the Puck Transfer Cage. The instrument software fully automates the sample loading and cooling processes, minimizing physical interaction with the cryostat to just a few minutes.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">The loading and unloading process, including airlock evacuation and transferring the puck to or from the millikelvin stage, takes less than 10 minutes.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Once loaded, the puck is cooled down automatically. Samples can be unloaded at any time, regardless of the cryostat temperature.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">After unloading, the puck can be warmed in an inert gas environment to prevent condensation.</p>
</div>

<h3 class="wp-block-heading has-black-color has-text-color" style="font-size:30px">Options and components</h3>



<div class="wp-block-group has-black-color has-grey-background-color has-text-color has-background"><div class="wp-block-group__inner-container is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow">

<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Mount superconducting and mu-metal multi-layer magnetic shielding around the sample space to characterize sensitive superconducting devices such as resonators and qubits.</li>



<li>Alternatively, you can integrate a sample magnet:<br>5 T or 8 T solenoid magnets<br>3  – 1  – 1 T vector magnet </li>
</ul>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="false" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h4 id="at-344" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">RF lines and cryogenic electronic components</h4><div id="ac-344" class="c-accordion__content">
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Extend standard DC lines with semi-rigid RF cables, rated to 18 GHz, and customer-specific attenuation for each line.</li>



<li>Integrate a variety of RF electronic components, including low-noise amplifiers, isolators, and filters into the DC and RF wiring trees, ensuring compatibility with state-of-the-art characterization techniques for all kinds of quantum devices.</li>
</ul>

<li class="has-black-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-8c5ddf6f073d7d9a11d3ff0b5988ff11">You can also integrate other Quantum Machines products, such as the <a href="https://www.quantum-machines.co/products/qfilter/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener"><strong>QFilter</strong></a> low-pass filter for DC lines and the <a href="https://www.quantum-machines.co/products/qbox/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener"><strong>QBox</strong></a> DC wiring breakout with your L-Type Rapid cryostat.</li>

<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Browser-based operation</h3>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">The software runs from your browser on a PC, laptop, tablet, or any other device with a network connection. This ensures maximum flexibility in everyday use, while ruling out compatibility issues with different operating systems in your setup.</p>

<div class="wp-block-cover is-light" id="faq"><span aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-cover__background has-white-background-color has-background-dim-100 has-background-dim"></span><div class="wp-block-cover__inner-container is-layout-flow wp-block-cover-is-layout-flow">
<div class="wp-block-group"><div class="wp-block-group__inner-container is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-black-color has-text-color">FAQ</h2>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-346" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">Will magnetic cooling expose my sample to harmful stray fields?</h3><div id="ac-346" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Our cryostat design mitigates magnetic fields to protect sensitive materials and devices. It uses compensated superconducting magnets and maximizes the distance between the sample stage and cooling units. Stray fields at the sample position remain below 50 µT – about the strength of the Earth’s magnetic field – even when all magnets are fully powered.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-347" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">Can I get ESD protection?</h3><div id="ac-347" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Yes, the system can be configured with ESD protection. <a href="https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us">Get in touch</a> for setup details. </p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-348" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">Does the L-Type Rapid provide continuous cooling?</h3><div id="ac-348" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Yes, depending on the configuration: continuous cooling is provided above 100 mK with 3-stage ADR, or above 200 mK with 2-stage ADR. <a href="https://kiutra.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/L-Type-Platform-November-2025.pdf">Full spec sheet here</a>. </p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-349" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">What do you mean by turnaround time?</h3><div id="ac-349" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">It’s the time between measurements on separately loaded samples:<strong><br></strong>Unloading: ~5 min <br>Warming up: ~30 min <br>Loading: ~5 min <br>Cooling down: 2–4.5 hours (depending on configuration) <br><strong>Total: ~40 min handling plus 2–4.5 hours cooldown. </strong></p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-3410" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">Can I get magnetic shielding?</h3><div id="ac-3410" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Yes, we can integrate magnetic shielding both on the system level and on the puck itself. This reduces the residual field by two orders of magnitude. <a href="https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us">Get in touch</a> for integration details.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-3411" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">Can I customize the system?</h3><div id="ac-3411" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Yes, it’s highly customizable. <a href="https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#options">See options</a> or <a href="https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us">contact us</a> to configure.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-3412" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">Can I upgrade to a different configuration after delivery?</h3><div id="ac-3412" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Yes. Our cryostats are designed to accommodate future upgrades. <a href="https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us">Get in touch</a> to discuss options. </p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-3413" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">Can I get a sample magnet?</h3><div id="ac-3413" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Yes. We can integrate: <br>5 T or 8 T solenoid magnets<br>3  – 1  – 1 T vector magnet <br><a href="https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us">Get in touch</a> to discuss options. </p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-3414" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">How large is the sample space?</h3><div id="ac-3414" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Puck 55: <br>55 mm in diameter and 117 mm in heigh<br><a href="https://kiutra.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/kiutra-L-Type-Rapid-Technical-Data-Sheet-Puck-55-1.pdf">Download the data sheet</a><br></p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-3415" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">Is there space to integrate RF electronics?</h3><div id="ac-3415" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Yes, in addition to the sample space on the puck, there is ample room to integrate cryogenic electronic components at the 4 K stage and on the sample stage. <a href="https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us">Get in touch</a> to discuss.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-3416" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">What wiring is included in the system?</h3><div id="ac-3416" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">The system is equipped with DC lines. It can be configured with RF wiring and RF electronics during the assembly. <a href="https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#options">See options</a>. </p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-3417" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">Is there a full system manual available?</h3><div id="ac-3417" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Yes, there is. <a href="https://kiutra.com/products/l-type-rapid-cryostat/#contact-us">Get in touch</a> if you are interested in getting a copy.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-3418" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">Can I measure qubits? </h3><div id="ac-3418" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Yes. See how we measured T1 times in superconducting qubits in <a href="https://kiutra.com/download-l-type-rapid-for-long-term-t1-benchmarking-of-superconducting-qubits/">this application note</a>. </p>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item no-js" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0"><h3 id="at-3419" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button">Does the cryostat need regular maintenance? </h3><div id="ac-3419" class="c-accordion__content">
<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-8f761849 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">The cryostat itself does not. The compressor requires maintenance every 30,000 operating hours, and the coldhead after 20,000 hours.</p>
